executive_summary: Proposal for demo-test to implement Revenue OS over 21 days.
client_situation_hypothesis: Client operates with scattered tools and manual follow-up. Revenue leakage is likely.
governance: Weekly review calls. Human approval required for all client-facing sends.
proof_plan: L0-L5 evidence ladder. Pilot metrics tracked weekly.
client_responsibilities: Provide CRM access and data exports

offer_reference:
# Revenue OS Offer

## Purpose
Turn scattered sales, follow-up, and pipeline into a governed revenue operating system.

## Scope
- Lead intake and scoring
- Outreach draft generation (human-reviewed)
- Follow-up queue and reminders
- Pipeline dashboard
- Weekly revenue brief

## Deliverables
- Configured Revenue OS instance
- Outreach template library (AR/EN)
- Pipeline dashboard
- SOP manual

## Timeline
21 days

## Pricing
Setup: 15,000 – 30,000 SAR
Monthly: 3,000 – 7,000 SAR

## Governance
-
